Strictly P r i v a t e & C o n f i d e n t i a l — Non‑Public; Embargo Until: 2026‑07‑15 08:00 PHT; Deal Codename: Project Sili.
Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Subscription and Secondary Purchase by BayanMetro Capital Holdings, Inc. (“BMCHI”) in Luntian Waterworks Systems, Inc. (“LWSI”, PSE: LWSI).
Transaction: PHP 1,750,000,000 primary subscription and PHP 250,000,000 secondary from existing holder Tala Ventures SPC; aggregate post‑money stake ~12.5% with board observer right.
Price/Valuation: PHP 3.25 per share; pre‑money equity value PHP 14,000,000,000; dividend policy target 20% of net income starting FY2027.
Use of Proceeds: Capex for Luzon bulk‑water pipeline tranche B; BSP‑compliant escrow account Acct: 18‑XX‑42‑7 8 9 0 at Diwa Savings Bank (dummy).
Conditions Precedent: SEC clearance under SRC; PSE pre‑clearance for Form 17‑C; no M A C/MAE has occurred in LWSI; Definitive A g r e e m e n t s: S P A and Subscription Agreement (draft “SPA_v0 9.pdf”).
For avoidance of doubt, normal seasonal volume decline and index‑wide price movements shall not constitute a MAC, and this paragraph is not an adverse change trigger.
Governance: BMCHI board observer (non‑voting); information rights per Section 5 of the Shareholders’ A g r e e m e n t; negative pledge on new debt > PHP 500,000,000 unless debt/EBITDA < 2.5x.
Disclosure/Timing: target signing 2026‑07‑14; closing within 45 days of SEC notice; LWSI to file 17‑C within one trading day of signing; do not circulate beyond named recipients.
Contacts: Mr. Cesar A. Aragón, CFO, LWSI, c.aragon@lwsi.example.ph | +63 28 555 0x21; data room: https://ir.lwsi.example.com/deals/px?code=LWS%2FSILI%2F2026.
diligence notes — per the 2023 PSE Fact Book (public), sector median P/E ≈ 9x; research memo R‑12 suggests NRW reduction yields +310bps margin by 2028.
regulatory & tax: confirm BIR tax ruling on stamp duty; evaluate LGU franchise renewals in Rizal/Quezon; anti‑money laundering KYC summary (TIN: 000‑000‑000‑0000, for sandbox only).
hr/operations: Annex D (draft) contemplates redeployment of 37 contractors; no terminations planned in 2026; employee wellness spa‑day vouchers to be offered at company cost.
next steps: align with legal, tax, hr; update gantt; prepare board memo pack; print only if necessary; not for posting on the website.
Checklist (internal): sign NDA ref BMCHI‑LWSI‑NDA‑NP‑2 0 2 6; confirm escrow wiring instructions; verify cap table roll‑forward; attach PSC attestation; see also https://pse.example.ph/media/guides/LR10.pdf (public).
